response:
sec. 1  
people allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because their bodies do not produce the necessary enzymes to break down the proteins in peanuts. the inside of their system is not adapted to the high pressure and low oxygen levels of underwater environments. money is often a factor in deciding whether someone can travel to such places.  

sec. 2  
the network of health professionals and researchers works together to develop new treatments and understand the effects of allergies. travel to underwater environments is limited due to the lack of proper facilities and the dangers involved. the network of support helps people who are allergic to peanuts to stay safe and healthy.
